ab: Iha’an inul’uan dii, muskun azak it tuqasnau’az muntaitu’ ha’an pantamaun naak tantungu.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪我的叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: Minaha’an azam Taihuku’ tunlaihlihsapuz panha’an Taitu’.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: Kaca’anin Taitu’ a, ma’unting laihlih ca pantamaun naak munha’an ul’uanlaihlih anpasduu zamun.
ch: 到了台東，我的叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: Nii’ tu daqvisan is ul’uanlaihlih ca lumaq it pantamaun naak, pudaan tukuc is laihlih a kaca’anin ta’.
ch: 車站離我叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: Maiza ca madaing sala ka sasaipukas sinaipuk ingalan lumaq it pantamaun naak, muskun azam tunpaqais munha’an sasaipukan.
ch: 我叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: Uutu ha’an sasaipukan, adasun azam pantamaun naak paka’un sidi ciin tancikis.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: Sanavanin, muskun azam munmicqang’acang ma’un qaisang.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: Madia’ sala ca laihlih ha’an micqang’acang, daqat tunpaupuh azam maipata’.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: Na mudaanin azam a, malulun tu munghav tanqa’iu’us bunun ca paupuh, daqat mu’hazin azam tunlaihlihqaungu’ mucuqais.
ch: 要回去的時候，發現摩托車被人偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: Kaha’anin azam Taihuku’ haip, niapang ti inku’ananin naupa ca paupuh kit pantamaun naak.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道我叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
